entity_extraction_template: For each row, extract the value of 'University_Name' as a University_Name entity node.
relation_extraction_template: For each time column, create: (University_Name) -[HAS_VALUE {year: X, status: Y, unit: Z}]-> (value). Example time columns: {2011}; {2012}; {2013}.
extraction_constraints: Each row represents one University_Name entity identified by 'University_Name'.
Time columns encode fiscal year, status, and unit in compound headers.
Parse compound headers (newline-separated) into year/status/unit attributes.
Create one HAS_VALUE relation per (entity, time_column) pair.
Skip cells with null or non-numeric values.
prompt_context: 这是一个时间序列矩阵表，记录了不同大学在2011-2016年间的性能评分。每一行代表一个University实体，由University_Name和Country两个字段唯一标识。表中的2011-2016列包含该大学在对应年份的性能指标数值。在知识图谱提取时，应为每个University实体创建HAS_PERFORMANCE_METRIC关系，关系属性包括：year（年份，整数类型）和score（性能评分，浮点数类型）。例如，California Institute of Technology在2011年的性能评分为96.0，应提取为一条关系：(California Institute of Technology, HAS_PERFORMANCE_METRIC, {year: 2011, score: 96.0})。不要为年份或数值创建独立的实体节点。

extraction_rules.subject_extraction: Each row represents a University entity identified by the composite key (University_Name, Country). Extract University_Name as the entity name and Country as a location attribute.
extraction_rules.value_extraction: Numeric values in columns 2011-2016 represent performance metrics (scores ranging 91.0-96.1). Extract as floating-point numbers without unit conversion.
extraction_rules.time_handling: Time periods are column headers (2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016). Parse each year as an integer attribute in the HAS_PERFORMANCE_METRIC relation. Each (University, year) pair maps to one relation instance with the score as the value attribute.
